subcodes.first_line: O Nazir! Upon thee be the peace of God and His loving-kindness! Thy letter hath attained unto Our presence, and inasmuch as it testified to bounty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ناظر علیک سلام الله و عنایته نامه شما بحضور فائز و چون مشعر بود بر نعمت
subcodes.subjects: @personal instructions, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
